title: Looking for honest feedback on my trading website tool with AI-powered insights.
author: StarNo3492
selftext:
Built for investors who want clarity, not complexity.



I’m putting together a simple web tool for swing traders / long-term investors that summarizes basic technicals into clearer context for better entry decisions.



Quick clarity first:

🚫 Not selling anything

🚫 No signups, no links

✅ Just trying to see if this solves a real problem



How I usually approach a trade



None of this is complicated on its own, but doing it consistently, cleanly, and without bias is harder than it sounds.



What I’m trying to build (high level)



– Automatically evaluates trend, momentum, and key levels

– Condenses multiple indicators into a simple, readable summary

– Focuses on entry context, not predictions or hype



Would love your thoughts on how the tool feels to use and what could be improved.



Brutally honest feedback appreciated 🙏



You can check the website from my profile.

If you find it useful, feel free to check out my socials and drop a follow.



Thanks for reading.

comments.author: Adventurous_Chart360
comments.body:
Can you review mine too   
Try [https://tradebotengine.com/](https://tradebotengine.com/)  
Every recommendation includes a confidence percentage and quality label so you can quickly prioritize entries.
